# This file is autogenerated by hyperschema-c
# !!DO NOT EDIT!!
#
# Expects: a `compact` CMake target provided by the consumer.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 4.0)

project(hc_schema C)

add_library(hc_schema OBJECT hc_schema.c)

set_target_properties(
  hc_schema
  PROPERTIES
  C_STANDARD 99
)

target_include_directories(hc_schema PUBLIC .)

target_link_libraries(hc_schema PUBLIC compact)
